articles.title: Boston Public Schools graduation rate reached all-time high last year, still lags behind state average
articles.description:
Boston Public Schools’s graduation rate increased to a record high 81.3 percent, eight percentage points behind the state's average.

The post Boston Public Schools graduation rate reached all-time high last year, still lags behind state average appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston Public Schools graduation rate reached a record high of 81.3 percent last year.
The rate is still eight percentage points below the Massachusetts state average.
Local residents may see increased focus on educational improvements to close the gap.

articles.title: Bruins’ playoff hopes are destined to fail if they can’t solve confounding road woes
articles.description:
"There's really no excuse for it, to be honest with you."

The post Bruins’ playoff hopes are destined to fail if they can’t solve confounding road woes appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins struggle on the road, risking playoff elimination this season.
Marco Sturm emphasizes the need for improvement before playoffs begin in April.
Continued road woes could frustrate Boston fans and impact team morale.

articles.title: This Marblehead man is running the Boston Marathon for his pediatric patients
articles.description:
"Every kid should have access to the best, most cutting edge treatments, and we aim to do that here, regardless of where the kids come from or what resources they have themselves."

The post This Marblehead man is running the Boston Marathon for his pediatric patients appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Marblehead resident runs Boston Marathon to support pediatric patients' access to treatments.
He emphasizes that every child deserves cutting-edge medical care, regardless of resources.
Funds raised will directly benefit local children's healthcare initiatives in Boston.

articles.title: Tommy DeCarlo, who became longtime singer of Boston after recording a Brad Delp tribute, dies at 60
articles.description:
DeCarlo's children, Annie, Talia, and Tommy Jr., said in posts on his Facebook and Instagram pages that their father, who had been struggling for months with brain cancer, died Monday.

The post Tommy DeCarlo, who became longtime singer of Boston after recording a Brad Delp tribute, dies at 60 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tommy DeCarlo, longtime singer of Boston, died at 60 from brain cancer on Monday.
His children announced his passing via social media, highlighting his struggle with illness.
DeCarlo's death impacts Boston's music community, as he was a significant local figure.

articles.title: 8 children have now died from flu in Mass. this season
articles.description:
The child died between the week of Feb. 21 and Feb. 28, the state's Department of Public Health reported.

The post 8 children have now died from flu in Mass. this season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Eight children have died from the flu in Massachusetts this season.
The latest death occurred between February 21 and February 28, 2023.
Residents are urged to ensure children are vaccinated against the flu.

articles.title: NBA cancels Hawks’ ‘Magic City’ promotion amid backlash following Luke Kornet’s letter
articles.description:
"While we appreciate the team's perspective and their desire to move forward, we have heard significant concerns from a broad array of league stakeholders"

The post NBA cancels Hawks’ ‘Magic City’ promotion amid backlash following Luke Kornet’s letter appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NBA cancels Atlanta Hawks' 'Magic City' promotion due to backlash from stakeholders.
Luke Kornet's letter prompted significant concerns among league officials and fans.
Boston residents may see similar scrutiny on promotions affecting community values.
